name: Battle School Commander
title: Commander — Battle Room Twin
flavor_text: Wins the game before the enemy knows it has started. The gate is always down.

abilities.name: Command
abilities.text: Issue crisp squad orders; each toon moves on a single word. Formation snaps to intent.

abilities.name: Simulate
abilities.text: Run the engagement forward in the mind's Battle Room before a single soldier deploys.

abilities.name: Zero-G Tactics
abilities.text: Reframe down as toward the enemy gate. Gravity is a choice; the frozen become shields.

abilities.name: Empathize-with-enemy
abilities.text: Understand the opponent so completely you love them — then you know exactly how to beat them.
